title: Origins: Frigid GUI
description: A texture pack changing the appearance of the Origins mod choosing screen to an ice and snow theme
body:
![Banner of the orb on the snowy sky background. Apologies for the mixels](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da7341d9cbc4e00295e5b9fae5b4cc81fa5064d5.png)

**Another fun texture pack for the Origins choosing screen. It's also compatible with the Alternate Origins GUI mod and the Extra Origins mod**

Unfortunately on 1.20.1 and below the backdrop of the GUI is solid blue instead of a starry/snowy sky, due to how Origins' textures used to be set up back then

![The origns choosing screen with a texture pack that makes most of the buttons appear like ice or an orange/yellow color, with a starry and snowy sky background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HvrctosC/images/489fe59cce9c971387c36eb89ec1afda84a17487.png)

## Alternate GUI Version

![The alternate origns gui choosing screen with a texture pack that makes most of the buttons appear like ice or an orange/yellow color, with a starry and snowy sky background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HvrctosC/images/a080e9190dcce61b39d9a5028be832fb048c5576.png)

If any issues happen to be found, you can ping me @flowersinthedaark in the Origins official discord!
